data.name: 影色漸染~阿斯林頓的妹神官~
data.detailed_description:
自幼不知道親生父母的青年羅伊德，與妹妹，托莉娜在名為阿斯林頓的邊境城鎮裡相依為命。

羅伊德在平日以狩獵和合成術為業，托莉娜也剛開始見習神官的工作，正當他們二人都以為這種平靜的生活能一直持續下去時，托莉娜卻因為突然的怪病而倒下。

羅伊德這才知道托莉娜有著隱藏的魔族血脈。那份血脈因為遠古被封印在此處的魔王的氣息而甦醒。

羅伊德必須想辦法解除封印，擊敗魔王————————在托莉娜變成自己不認識的人之前。

在充滿細節的世界中旅行，遇見形形色色的角色，幾乎每個人都有自己的故事和任務。通過製作物品和升級裝備來提升實力。與鎮上的居民交談，搜集任何可能幫助托莉娜的信息，只是她的病情會隨著體內魔血的覺醒不斷惡化。踏出小鎮邊界，尋找稀有材料，探索地下城，與怪物戰鬥。但是，在經歷了一天的冒險之後，別忘了回來照顧托莉娜日益增長的對魔力的渴望。
data.about_the_game:
自幼不知道親生父母的青年羅伊德，與妹妹，托莉娜在名為阿斯林頓的邊境城鎮裡相依為命。

羅伊德在平日以狩獵和合成術為業，托莉娜也剛開始見習神官的工作，正當他們二人都以為這種平靜的生活能一直持續下去時，托莉娜卻因為突然的怪病而倒下。

羅伊德這才知道托莉娜有著隱藏的魔族血脈。那份血脈因為遠古被封印在此處的魔王的氣息而甦醒。

羅伊德必須想辦法解除封印，擊敗魔王————————在托莉娜變成自己不認識的人之前。

在充滿細節的世界中旅行，遇見形形色色的角色，幾乎每個人都有自己的故事和任務。通過製作物品和升級裝備來提升實力。與鎮上的居民交談，搜集任何可能幫助托莉娜的信息，只是她的病情會隨著體內魔血的覺醒不斷惡化。踏出小鎮邊界，尋找稀有材料，探索地下城，與怪物戰鬥。但是，在經歷了一天的冒險之後，別忘了回來照顧托莉娜日益增長的對魔力的渴望。
data.short_description: 為了拯救被魔族血脈詛咒的托莉娜，踏上一段征服魔王的旅途；保護她免遭身邊虎視眈眈者的毒手；掌握合成技術，下地牢，戰強敵，你能及時拯救她嗎？
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文, 英文, 日文*, 韓文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ i3-2100 or similar
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce™ GTX 640 series or similar
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ i7-4600M or similar
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce™ GTX 750 series or similar
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Fallen Priestess: My Sister's Demonic Bloodline
data.detailed_description:
Lloyd grew up never knowing his real parents, living with his sister Trina in the border town of Aslint. He hunts and works as an artificer, while Trina has just begun training as a priestess. Their quiet life shatters when Trina falls mysteriously ill. Lloyd soon learns that Trina carries demon blood, triggered by the presence of a sealed Demon Lord nearby. To save his sister from a worsening fate, Lloyd must find a way to defeat the Demon Lord—before she transforms into someone unrecognisable.

Travel the richly detailed world, full of diverse characters, each with their own stories and quests to discover. Craft items and upgrade your gear to grow stronger. Converse with the townsfolk to gather any information that could help Trina, whose condition worsens as the demon blood within her awakens. Venture beyond the town’s borders and gather rare ingredients, explore dungeons, battle monsters, and level up. But after a long day’s adventure, don’t forget to return and tend to Trina's growing thirst for mana.
data.about_the_game:
Lloyd grew up never knowing his real parents, living with his sister Trina in the border town of Aslint. He hunts and works as an artificer, while Trina has just begun training as a priestess. Their quiet life shatters when Trina falls mysteriously ill. Lloyd soon learns that Trina carries demon blood, triggered by the presence of a sealed Demon Lord nearby. To save his sister from a worsening fate, Lloyd must find a way to defeat the Demon Lord—before she transforms into someone unrecognisable.

Travel the richly detailed world, full of diverse characters, each with their own stories and quests to discover. Craft items and upgrade your gear to grow stronger. Converse with the townsfolk to gather any information that could help Trina, whose condition worsens as the demon blood within her awakens. Venture beyond the town’s borders and gather rare ingredients, explore dungeons, battle monsters, and level up. But after a long day’s adventure, don’t forget to return and tend to Trina's growing thirst for mana.
data.short_description: Embark on a thrilling quest to defeat the Demon King and save Trina from the curse of her demon blood. Protect her from those who seek to corrupt and steal her from you. Conquer dungeons, battle dangerous foes, and master unique Synthesis skills in this intense adventure!
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese*, Korean, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
